prompt: A photoreal seascape at dawn — jagged volcanic black-rock coastline with crashing turquoise waves frozen in long-exposure silk-smooth motion. Soft pastel sunrise sky in pink-orange-violet gradient. A single weathered cypress tree growing from a cliff edge in silhouette on the right. Distant sea stacks fading into mist. Hyper-real, fine detail in rocks and water spray, professional landscape photography, ND filter long exposure aesthetic.
